children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall provide grants or zero interest loans to borrowers under this chapter for the purpose of promoting rural economic development and job creation projects, including funding for project feasibility studies, start-up costs, incubator projects, and other reasonable expenses for the purpose of fostering rural development.1See Additional Funding for Fiscal Year 2024 note below.1

children.heading: Repayments
children.label: b Repayments
children.text: In the case of zero interest loans, the Secretary shall establish such reasonable repayment terms as will encourage borrower participation.

children.heading: Proceeds
children.label: c Proceeds
children.text: All proceeds from the repayment of such loans made under this section shall be returned to the subaccount that the Secretary shall maintain in accordance with sections 940c(b)(2) and 940c–2(f) of this title.

children.heading: Number of grants
children.label: d Number of grants
children.text: Loans and grants required under this section shall be made to the full extent of the amounts made available under subsection (e).

children.heading: Discretionary funding
children.label: 1 Discretionary funding
children.text: In addition to other funds that are available to carry out this section, there is authorized to be appropriated not more than $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023 to carry out this section, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Mandatory funding
children.label: 2 Mandatory funding
children.text: Of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall credit to the subaccount to use for the cost of grants and loans under this section $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2024, to remain available until expended.

children.label: A
children.text: the interest differential sums credited to the subaccount described in subsection (c); and

children.label: B
children.text: subject to , the fees described in subsection (c)(4) of such section.section 940c–1(e)(2) of this title

children.heading: Maintenance of account
children.label: f Maintenance of account
children.text: The Secretary shall maintain the subaccount described in , as in effect in fiscal year 2017, for purposes of carrying out this section.section 940c(b)(2) of this title
